steps: File formal tax reclaim with Australian Tax Office for BHP Group Ltd dividend citing AU-NO treaty entitlement to 15% withholding rate versus 25% applied
Submit Form NAT 3157 (Application for Refund of Franking Credits) with supporting documentation showing Norwegian tax residency and treaty eligibility
Contact Citigroup Australia to request assistance with ATO reclaim process and provide custodian confirmation of incorrect withholding
Follow up with Skatteetaten to ensure proper foreign tax credit treatment of the reclaimed amount once received

references.title: ATO – Withholding from Dividends Paid to Foreign Residents
